title: Value-based genomics.
author: Gong J Pan K Fakih M Pal S Salgia R
content: S-EPMC5884665 PMC5884665 Value-based genomics. Advancements in next-generation sequencing have greatly enhanced the development of biomarker-driven cancer therapies. The affordability and availability of next-generation sequencers have allowed for the commercialization of next-generation sequencing
